'''âf-f-n-v''' ('''kafafnevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cahoot|cahoot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cahoot|cahoot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-f-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafafnevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafnevoko|thifafnevoko]] || [[word:jifafnevoko|jifafnevoko]] || [[word:shifafnevoko|shifafnevoko]] || [[word:kifafnevoko|kifafnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufafnevoko|thuthufafnevoko]] || [[word:jujufafnevoko|jujufafnevoko]] || [[word:shushufafnevoko|shushufafnevoko]] || [[word:kukufafnevoko|kukufafnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufafnevoko|thufafnevoko]] || [[word:jufafnevoko|jufafnevoko]] || [[word:shufafnevoko|shufafnevoko]] || [[word:kufafnevoko|kufafnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufafnevoko|thufafnevoko]] || [[word:jufafnevoko|jufafnevoko]] || [[word:shufafnevoko|shufafnevoko]] || [[word:kufafnevoko|kufafnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefafnevoko|thefafnevoko]] || [[word:jefafnevoko|jefafnevoko]] || [[word:shefafnevoko|shefafnevoko]] || [[word:kefafnevoko|kefafnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofafnevoko|thothofafnevoko]] || [[word:jojofafnevoko|jojofafnevoko]] || [[word:shoshofafnevoko|shoshofafnevoko]] || [[word:kokofafnevoko|kokofafnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofafnevoko|thofafnevoko]] || [[word:jofafnevoko|jofafnevoko]] || [[word:shofafnevoko|shofafnevoko]] || [[word:kofafnevoko|kofafnevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofafnevoko|thofafnevoko]] || [[word:jofafnevoko|jofafnevoko]] || [[word:shofafnevoko|shofafnevoko]] || [[word:kofafnevoko|kofafnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfafnevoko|thĂŠfafnevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfafnevoko|jĂŠfafnevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfafnevoko|shĂŠfafnevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfafnevoko|kĂŠfafnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafafnevoko|thathafafnevoko]] || [[word:jajafafnevoko|jajafafnevoko]] || [[word:shashafafnevoko|shashafafnevoko]] || [[word:kakafafnevoko|kakafafnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafafnevoko|thafafnevoko]] || [[word:jafafnevoko|jafafnevoko]] || [[word:shafafnevoko|shafafnevoko]] || [[word:kafafnevoko|kafafnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafnevoko|thafafnevoko]] || [[word:jafafnevoko|jafafnevoko]] || [[word:shafafnevoko|shafafnevoko]] || [[word:kafafnevoko|kafafnevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafafnevithi|shafafnevithi]] || [[word:shafafneviji|shafafneviji]] || [[word:shafafnevishi|shafafnevishi]] || [[word:shafafneviki|shafafneviki]]
